title.en: China-to-Cambodia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入柬埔寨：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入柬埔寨：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Cambodia ISC conformity requirements, EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) licensing and grid-connection rules, EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) utility connection specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-series EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and Cambodian Standard (CS) / IEC adoption context — versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与柬埔寨ISC合格评定要求、EAC（柬埔寨电力局）许可及并网规则、EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）电网接入规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000系列EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及柬埔寨标准（CS）/IEC采纳背景——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與柬埔寨ISC合格評定要求、EAC（柬埔寨電力局）許可及併網規則、EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）電網接入規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000系列EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及柬埔寨標準（CS）/IEC採納背景——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ISC conformity scope determination, EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) licensing decision, EDC grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Cambodia ISC Technical Standards, EAC rooftop-solar and grid-connection rules, EDC utility connection requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. EAC policy on distributed rooftop solar and capacity caps is evolving — verify current status directly with EAC.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ISC合格评定范围裁定、EAC（柬埔寨电力局）许可决定、EDC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行柬埔寨ISC技术标准、EAC屋顶太阳能及并网规则、EDC电力接入要求及项目业主要求。EAC关于分布式屋顶太阳能及容量上限的政策仍在演变——请直接向EAC核实当前状态。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ISC合格評定範圍裁定、EAC（柬埔寨電力局）許可決定、EDC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行柬埔寨ISC技術標準、EAC屋頂太陽能及併網規則、EDC電力接入要求及項目業主要求。EAC關於分散式屋頂太陽能及容量上限的政策仍在演變——請直接向EAC核實當前狀態。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Cambodia, the three mandatory compliance gates are: (1) ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) conformity — CS standards adopting IEC 62109-1/-2 for safety; (2) EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) licensing and grid-connection approval, including IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance and EDC utility-connection acceptance for the 230/400 V, 50 Hz Cambodia grid; and (3) EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) connection requirements for utility-scale and rooftop C&I projects. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are not automatically accepted in Cambodia and cannot substitute IEC-referenced evidence without supplementary IEC test documentation. EAC rooftop-solar policy, capacity caps, and technical requirements are actively evolving — verify current rules directly with EAC before project commitment.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口柬埔寨时，须通过三项强制合规关口：（1）ISC（柬埔寨标准院）合格评定——柬埔寨标准（CS）采用IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求；（2）EAC（柬埔寨电力局）许可及并网审批，包括IEC 62116防孤岛合规及针对柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz电网的EDC接入认可；（3）公用事业规模及工商业屋顶项目的EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）接入要求。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准在柬埔寨不自动获得认可，不可在没有补充IEC测试文件的情况下替代IEC要求的证据。EAC屋顶太阳能政策、容量上限及技术要求仍在积极演变——在项目承诺前请直接向EAC核实当前规则。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口柬埔寨時，須通過三項強制合規關口：（1）ISC（柬埔寨標準院）合格評定——柬埔寨標準（CS）採用IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求；（2）EAC（柬埔寨電力局）許可及併網審批，包括IEC 62116防孤島合規及針對柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz電網的EDC接入認可；（3）公用事業規模及工商業屋頂項目的EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）接入要求。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準在柬埔寨不自動獲得認可，不可在沒有補充IEC測試文件的情況下替代IEC要求的證據。EAC屋頂太陽能政策、容量上限及技術要求仍在積極演變——在項目承諾前請直接向EAC核實當前規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
